name: rinse
title: Rinse
description: Rinse the Claude off your clipboard.
author: lukemcdonald

commands.name: clean-and-copy
commands.title: Clean & Copy
commands.description: So fresh and so clean, clean.

commands.name: clean-and-review
commands.title: Clean & Review
commands.description: Confirm the baby. Toss the bathwater.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
scripts.publish: gh repo sync lukemcdonald/raycast-extensions && npm run pull-contributions && npx @raycast/api@latest publish
scripts.style: npm run format:fix && npm run lint:fix
